title: Right to Fish" Law
doc_html:
SUBPART N.  RIGHT TO FISH

§640.1.  "Right to Fish" Law

This Subpart shall be known as and may be referred to as the Louisiana Right to Fish Law.  

Acts 1986, No. 988, §1.
